code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut found = 0

while found < 2
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let b1 = match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b1 == 32 or b1 == 9 or b1 == 10 or b1 == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  mut token = ""
  mut reading = true
  while reading
    if i >= n
      reading = false
    else
      let b2 = match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b2 == 32 or b2 == 9 or b2 == 10 or b2 == 13
        reading = false
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end

  let v = match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if found == 0
    a = v
  else
    b = v
  end
  found = found + 1
end

let r = a * a + b * b
println("r=#{r}")
